creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #6)

What I think we need to do is to alter the rc script in base to use either. My previous patches to the port did this but I this confused people. I'd probably need a review for that first. This is what we do with ntpd. Just change the ntpd_program in rc.conf. I think this is the path forward. With kdc it is different since the Heimdal kdc needs a -d option while MIT krb5kdc barfs on -d, as it's not supported.

What if I write up a phab review and you can review it. Are there any others you can think of to review it?
